articles.title: Partition, Prompt, Aggregate: Statistical Self-Consistency in Language Models
articles.abstract: In-context learning is commonly interpreted as a form of conditional inference, in which the prompt specifies a context and the model's output is treated as an estimate of the corresponding conditional distribution. If this interpretation holds, then LLM estimates should satisfy basic probabilistic identities. In particular, the law of total probability asserts that prior-weighted conditional distributions aggregate into population-level marginals over any valid partition of the population. In this work, we investigate to what extent LLM estimates adhere to this self-consistency principle. We use binary trees as an evaluation scaffold to recursively partition a population into increasingly fine-grained subpopulations. We then prompt LLMs with verbalized subpopulation descriptions in context, aggregate the resulting estimates back into population-level estimates, and compare them across partitions of varying granularity. Applying this protocol across problem domains and state-of-the-art frontier models, we show widespread violations of basic consistency properties. An in-depth study of persona prompting reveals a pattern we call the macro fallacy: estimates reconstructed from more fine-grained subpopulation responses are often better aligned with human reference data than direct population-level estimates. This effect persists across variations in tree structure and estimation task, and can be partially recovered through implicit prompting. Together, these findings suggest that models possess relevant subpopulation knowledge but do not reliably propagate it into aggregate estimates. This gap establishes statistical self-consistency as an unsaturated, reference-free criterion for evaluating LLMs.
articles.titleCn: 划分、提示、聚合：语言模型中的统计自洽性
articles.abstractCn: 情境学习通常被解释为一种条件推理形式，其中提示指定了上下文，而模型的输出被视为对应条件分布的估计。如果这种解释成立，那么大语言模型（LLM）的估计应该满足基本的概率恒等式。特别是，全概率法则断言，在人口任何有效划分上的先验加权条件分布会聚合成人口层面的边缘分布。在这项工作中，我们研究了LLM估计在多大程度上遵循这一自洽原则。我们使用二叉树作为评估框架，递归地将人口划分为越来越细粒度的子群体。然后，我们在上下文中用语言化的子群体描述提示LLM，将生成的估计重新聚合为人口层面的估计，并在不同粒度的划分之间进行比较。通过在问题领域和最前沿模型上应用此协议，我们展示了广泛违反基本一致性特性的现象。对角色提示的深入研究揭示了一种我们称为宏观谬误的模式：从更细粒度的子群体响应中重建的估计通常比直接的人口层面估计更符合人类参考数据。这种效应在树结构和估计任务的变化中持续存在，并且可以通过隐式提示部分恢复。综合这些发现表明，模型拥有相关的子群体知识，但并不能可靠地将这些知识传播到聚合估计中。这种差距确立了统计自洽作为评估LLM的无参考标准。

articles.title: SciDiagramEdit: Learning to Edit Scientific Diagrams from Paper Revisions
articles.abstract: Editing the figures in a research paper is a routine and time-consuming part of everyday research practice: authors relabel components, rearrange panels, and restyle visuals as they revise their manuscripts. Automating this editing workflow under a natural-language instruction, however, is challenging, because a scientific figure is a dense infographic in which heterogeneous visual elements such as schematics, plots, photos, captions, and arrows are composed under a tight visual grammar to advance a specific argument. To address this, we present SciDiagramEdit, a benchmark and skill-evolution framework that learns from natural paper revisions and operates on the figure's editable vector source, where users can inspect and co-edit individual primitives alongside the agent. Our benchmark mines before/after figure pairs from arXiv version histories, each grounded in the authors' own revision intent. To accommodate the diversity of editing instructions, we adopt agentic learning via skill evolution: an agentic proposer continually refines the agent's skill specification from execution traces over multiple epochs. The resulting skill progressively lifts edit accuracy on a held-out validation set, providing evidence that natural paper revisions are an effective training signal for instruction-driven figure editing.
articles.titleCn: SciDiagramEdit：从论文修订中学习编辑科学图表
articles.abstractCn: 在研究论文中编辑图表是日常研究实践中常规且耗时的一部分：作者在修改稿件时会重新标记组件、重新排列面板以及重新设计视觉效果。然而，在自然语言指令下自动化这一编辑工作流程具有挑战性，因为科学图表是一种密集的信息图，其中各种异构视觉元素（如图解、图表、照片、标题和箭头）在紧密的视觉语法下组合起来，以推进特定论点。为解决这一问题，我们提出了SciDiagramEdit，这是一个基准测试和技能进化框架，该框架从自然论文修订中学习，并在图表的可编辑矢量源上运行，用户可以与代理一同检查和共同编辑单个基元。我们的基准测试从arXiv版本历史中挖掘了“之前/之后”图表对，每一对都基于作者的修订意图。为了适应编辑指令的多样性，我们采用了基于技能进化的代理学习：一个代理提议者从多个时期的执行跟踪中持续改进代理的技能规范。由此产生的技能逐步提高了在保留的验证集上的编辑准确率，这表明自然论文修订是驱动图表编辑的有效训练信号。

articles.title: Pretraining Data Can Be Poisoned through Computational Propaganda
articles.abstract: Poisoning pretraining data can introduce harmful behaviors to LMs that are difficult to detect and mitigate. Prior work on poisoning pretraining data has largely exploited established data sources such as Wikipedia, which do not represent the large scale and heterogeneity typical of pretraining corpora, and has ignored the interaction between poisoned data and data curation pipelines. We demonstrate that poisoning attacks on pretraining data are feasible beyond this limited setting through an existing web-scale content injection mechanism: public discussion interfaces. Additionally, to measure whether malicious content is included after web crawling and data curation, we introduce HalfLife, a novel analysis for estimating adversarial content inclusion in web-crawl based LM training data. We use HalfLife to explore the feasibility of poisoning pretraining corpora at web scale through open discussion interfaces. Our analysis demonstrates the importance of estimating whether poison injections are included in pretraining data, and establishes third-party webpage content as a possible vector for attacking language model pretraining.
articles.titleCn: 预训练数据可能通过计算宣传被污染
articles.abstractCn: 对预训练数据进行投毒可能向语言模型引入难以检测和缓解的有害行为。以往对预训练数据投毒的研究主要利用维基百科等既定数据源，而这些数据源无法代表预训练语料库所具有的大规模和异构性，并且忽略了投毒数据与数据处理流程之间的相互作用。我们通过现有的网络规模内容注入机制——公开讨论界面——证明，对预训练数据的投毒攻击在此有限场景之外也是可行的。此外，为了衡量网络爬取和数据处理后是否包含恶意内容，我们引入了HalfLife，这是一种用于估计基于网络爬取的语言模型训练数据中对抗性内容包含程度的新分析方法。我们使用HalfLife探索通过公开讨论界面在网络规模上对预训练语料库进行投毒的可行性。我们的分析证明了评估预训练数据中是否包含投毒注入的重要性，并确立了第三方网页内容作为攻击语言模型预训练的可能途径。

articles.title: Bridge Evidence: Static Retrieval Utility Does Not Predict Causal Utility in Multi-Step Agentic Search
articles.abstract: Retrieval systems are trained and evaluated on a static idea of usefulness: hand a document and a question to a reader model, see whether the answer improves, and score the document accordingly. The idea holds up when a document is read on its own. It breaks when a language model works as a search agent, issuing several queries and reasoning across turns, because a document can matter for what it lets the agent do next rather than for what it says about the current question. We measure that gap rather than argue it. Using a ReAct style agent over HotpotQA, we replay 1000 development questions and, for every document the agent read, delete it and re-run the rest of the trajectory from that point. Comparing the original run against its counterfactual gives a Counterfactual Trajectory Utility (CTU) score from three deltas: final answer quality, next query retrieval quality, and turn count. Crossing CTU against Static RAG Utility (SRU) over 23,322 document observations, the two are close to statistically independent (Spearman rho = -0.026). Roughly a third of the documents the agent reads are causally load bearing while looking useless to a static reader; we call these bridge documents. The pattern survives when the reader based axis is swapped for a BM25 and cross encoder proxy, giving a bridge cell of 27.2% on an evenly spread axis. A second experiment pins down the mechanism. Using the Observable Entity Relevance (OER) measure from prior work, entities that discriminate relevant from non-relevant candidates appear in the agent's next query 4.02 times more often than entities found only in non-relevant documents (6.1% vs 1.5%, n = 227,139). A bridge document earns its keep by handing the agent a discriminative entity that redirects the search. Static relevance and causal usefulness are different quantities in agentic retrieval, and optimizing the first does not deliver the second.
articles.titleCn: 桥梁证据：静态检索效用不能预测多步代理搜索中的因果效用
articles.abstractCn: 检索系统基于一个静态的有用性概念进行训练和评估：向阅读模型提供一份文档和一个问题，观察答案是否得到改善，并据此对文档进行评分。当单独阅读文档时，这个概念是成立的。但当语言模型作为搜索代理工作时，发出多个查询并在回合间进行推理时，这个概念就会失效，因为文档的重要性可能在于它能让代理在下一步做什么，而不是它对当前问题说了什么。我们测量这种差距，而不是争论它。使用ReAct风格的代理在HotpotQA上重放1000个开发问题，对于代理读取的每个文档，删除它并从该点重新运行其余轨迹。将原始运行与其反事实进行比较，得到一个由三个增量组成的反事实轨迹效用（CTU）分数：最终答案质量、下一个查询检索质量以及回合数。将CTU与静态RAG效用（SRU）在23,322份文档观察中进行交叉分析，两者在统计上接近独立（Spearman rho = -0.026）。大约三分之一的代理读取的文档在静态读者看来无用，但在因果关系上起支撑作用；我们称这些为桥梁文档。当以BM25和交叉编码代理替换基于读者的轴时，这种模式依然存在，在均匀分布的轴上给出27.2%的桥梁单元。第二个实验确定了这种机制。使用先前工作中的可观察实体相关性（OER）度量，与仅在非相关文档中发现的实体相比，区分相关与非相关候选的实体在代理的下一个查询中出现了4.02倍（6.1% vs 1.5%，n = 227,139）。桥梁文档通过向代理提供具有区分性的实体来重定向搜索而获得其价值。在代理检索中，静态相关性和因果关系效用是不同的量，优化前者并不能带来后者。

articles.title: Beyond the Leaderboard: Design Lessons for Trustworthy Multimodal VQA
articles.abstract: Healthcare multimodal AI must combine visual and textual evidence while remaining reliable and interpretable. Using MediaEval Medico 2025 as a retrospective GI endoscopy case study, we analyze design choices across nine documented systems for question answering and explanation quality. Parameter-efficient adaptation of pretrained backbones provides strong challenge performance, but answer-level gains do not consistently translate into faithful and complete clinical reasoning. Methods enforcing structured reasoning and explicit grounding show more reliable behavior across heterogeneous question types, although the evidence is correlational rather than ablation-based. These results motivate evaluation beyond lexical overlap, standardized evidence-linked explanations, leakage-aware data governance, and lightweight robustness and calibration checks. The findings support trustworthy multimodal healthcare AI based on data fusion, explainability, and resilient evaluation.
articles.comment: Accepted for presentation at the 39th IEEE International Symposium on Computer-Based Medical Systems (IEEE CBMS 2026) as a regular paper
articles.titleCn: 超越排行榜：可信多模态问答系统的设计启示
articles.abstractCn: 医疗多模态AI必须结合视觉和文本证据，同时保持可靠性和可解释性。以MediaEval Medico 2025作为回顾性胃肠镜病例研究，我们分析了九个已记录系统在问答和解释质量方面的设计选择。预训练主干参数高效适配提供了强劲的挑战性能，但答案层面的提升并未始终转化为忠实且完整的临床推理。强制结构化推理和明确证据关联的方法在异构问题类型中表现出更可靠的行为，尽管相关证据是基于关联而非消融实验。这些结果促使我们超越词汇重叠评估，采用标准化证据关联解释、泄漏感知数据治理，以及轻量级鲁棒性和校准检查。研究结果表明，基于数据融合、可解释性和弹性评估的可靠多模态医疗AI是可行的。

articles.title: TikStance: A Multimodal and Hierarchical Dataset for Multi-target Stance Analysis in TikTok Political Conversations
articles.abstract: Political discourse has increasingly moved to short-video platforms, yet computational analysis of such content remains constrained by the scarcity of datasets that jointly preserve audiovisual information and hierarchical conversations. Here we present TikStance, a multimodal and context-aware dataset comprising 161 videos and 13,876 comments from TikTok, designed for stance detection in political discussions. The dataset covers three major political figures in the 2024 U.S. election cycle--Donald Trump, Joe Biden, and Kamala Harris--with content collected between September 2023 and January 2025. Each discussion unit links a host video and its metadata to a parent-linked comment tree, enabling stance analysis within both audiovisual and conversational context. Each item was independently labeled by three annotators using a three-class scheme (Favor, Against, None) for video-to-target and comment-to-target stance; items with disagreement were re-annotated, and the final Krippendorff's \(α\) reached 0.743, 0.723, and 0.722 for the Trump, Biden, and Harris subsets, respectively. Descriptive analysis further reveals target-dependent differences in stance distributions and conversational depth, with nested replies accounting for 23.3\% of all comments. By combining multi-target coverage, hierarchical conversations, and reliable multi-level human annotations, TikStance supports research in multimodal stance detection, political communication, computational social science, and context-aware natural language processing.
articles.titleCn: TikStance：一个用于抖音政治对话中多目标立场分析的 multimodal 和分层数据集
articles.abstractCn: 政治话语正日益转向短视频平台，但此类内容的计算分析仍受限于同时保留视听信息和层级对话的数据集稀缺。在此，我们提出TikStance，一个多模态且具有上下文感知能力的数据集，包含来自TikTok的161个视频和13,876条评论，旨在用于政治讨论中的立场检测。该数据集涵盖了2024年美国选举周期中的三位主要政治人物——唐纳德·特朗普、乔·拜登和卡玛拉·哈里斯——内容收集时间介于2023年9月至2025年1月。每个讨论单元将一个主视频及其元数据链接到父级关联的评论树，从而在视听和对话上下文中进行立场分析。每项内容由三位标注员独立使用三分类方案（支持、反对、无关）进行视频对目标及评论对目标的立场标注；存在分歧的项目会重新标注，最终特朗普、拜登和哈里斯子集的Krippendorff's α系数分别达到0.743、0.723和0.722。描述性分析进一步揭示了目标依赖的立场分布和对话深度差异，嵌套回复占所有评论的23.3%。通过结合多目标覆盖、层级对话和可靠的多级人工标注，TikStance支持多模态立场检测、政治传播、计算社会科学和上下文感知自然语言处理领域的研究。

articles.title: Language Identification via Compositional Data Analysis: A Linear-Time Classifier Based on Log-Ratio Geometry
articles.abstract: Language identification is commonly addressed using either neural architectures or statistical n-gram models. Neural approaches typically require substantial computational resources, whereas classical frequency-based methods offer efficient linear-time performance, but rely on distance metrics that are not always appropriate for compositional data. This work models character and bigram frequency distributions as compositional vectors constrained to the simplex and mapped via the centered log-ratio (CLR) transformation bijectively onto the $(D-1)$-dimensional zero-sum subspace of $\mathbb{R}^D$, where Euclidean distances correspond to Aitchison distances. A pipeline is proposed, combining CLR-transformed unigram and bigram features with Laplace smoothing to address sparsity. The method is evaluated on six languages. Experimental results show that the proposed approach achieves robust accuracy across different text lengths, with strong performance for longer sequences. These findings indicate that compositional representations provide a deterministic and computationally efficient alternative for language identification, particularly in settings where interpretability and low resource consumption are essential.
articles.titleCn: 基于对数比几何的线性时间分类器：通过组合数据分析进行语言识别
articles.abstractCn: 语言识别通常采用神经网络架构或统计n-gram模型来解决。神经网络方法通常需要大量的计算资源，而经典的基于频率的方法则提供高效的线性时间性能，但依赖于距离度量，这些度量并不总是适用于组合数据。这项工作将字符和bigram频率分布建模为约束在单纯形上的组合向量，并通过中心对数比（CLR）变换双射地映射到$\mathbb{R}^D$的$(D-1)$维零和子空间上，其中欧几里得距离对应于Aitchison距离。提出了一种流程，结合CLR变换的单词和bigram特征，并使用拉普拉斯平滑来处理稀疏性。该方法在六种语言上进行了评估。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在不同文本长度下均实现了稳健的准确率，对较长的序列表现出优异的性能。这些发现表明，组合表示为语言识别提供了一种确定性和计算效率高的替代方案，特别是在可解释性和低资源消耗至关重要的场景中。

articles.title: In-Place Tokenizer Expansion for Pre-trained LLMs
articles.abstract: A tokenizer fixed at the start of pre-training allocates vocabulary in proportion to the pre-training corpus, reflecting the deployment priorities at that time. When those priorities shift, languages added later are split into many more tokens per word, which can raise latency, compute, and energy consumption for users of those languages. Cloud models can afford a broad vocabulary because the embedding and LM-head matrices are a small fraction of their parameters. On a compact model those matrices are a material share of per-token decode bandwidth, so on-device models ship small vocabularies and accept fragmentation outside a fixed language set. We present tokenizer expansion, an in-place recipe for upgrading a pre-trained model's tokenizer when the model producer controls its design. We continue the existing tokenizer's BPE merges on a multilingual corpus, so most source tokens carry over unchanged as single tokens and every new token has an exact decomposition into source tokens. We copy the carried-over embedding rows unchanged and initialize new rows as the mean of their source sub-token embeddings. A two-stage adaptation, embedding-only training then full-model continued pre-training, recovers source-checkpoint quality. We apply the recipe to a continued pre-trained checkpoint of LFM2-8B-A1B, an 8B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model, to help produce LFM2.5-8B-A1B with a 128K tokenizer. The expanded tokenizer encodes Hindi and Vietnamese in roughly $2.4\times$ and $2.6\times$ fewer tokens than the source (up to $4.0\times$ on Thai). Combining these reductions with the measured per-token cost of the larger vocabulary, we estimate a $2.2$-$3.7\times$ per-character decode speedup for these languages across our reference devices. We release the model weights and the expanded tokenizer, and report the negative findings that shaped the recipe.
articles.titleCn: 预训练LLM的原位分词扩展
articles.abstractCn: 一个在预训练阶段固定的分词器会根据预训练语料库按比例分配词汇量，反映了当时部署的优先级。当这些优先级发生变化时，后来添加的语言会被分配更多的每个词的标记，这可能会提高这些语言用户的延迟、计算和能耗。云模型可以拥有广泛的词汇量，因为嵌入和LM头矩阵只占其参数的一小部分。在紧凑模型中，这些矩阵占每个标记解码带宽的相当一部分，因此设备上的模型会使用较小的词汇量，并在固定语言集之外接受碎片化。我们提出了分词器扩展，这是一种在模型生产者控制其设计时升级预训练模型分词器的方法。我们在多语言语料库上继续现有分词器的BPE合并，因此大多数源标记保持不变作为单个标记，每个新标记都有精确的源标记分解。我们不变地复制传递的嵌入行，并将新行初始化为其源子标记嵌入的平均值。一个两阶段适应，仅嵌入训练然后完整模型的持续预训练，恢复了源检查点质量。我们将此方法应用于一个8B参数专家混合模型的持续预训练检查点LFM2-8B-A1B，以帮助生产具有128K分词器的LFM2.5-8B-A1B。扩展的分词器在印地语和越南语上编码所需的标记比源标记少约2.4倍和2.6倍（泰语最高可达4.0倍）。结合这些减少与较大词汇量的每个标记成本，我们估计在我们的参考设备上，这些语言的单字符解码速度提高了2.2-3.7倍。我们发布了模型权重和扩展的分词器，并报告了塑造此方法的负面发现。

articles.title: Expanding the Lexicon of Ge'ez Based African Languages: A Comparative Study of Amharic and Tigrinya
articles.abstract: Multilingual pre-trained language models (PLMs) exhibit degraded performance on low-resource, non-Latin-script languages, driven by high out-of-vocabulary (OOV) rates and excessive subword fragmentation that result from Latin-script-centric tokenizer training. We introduce VEXMLM, a vocabulary-extended variant of XLM-R targeting the two highest-resource Ge'ez-script languages, Amharic and Tigrinya, and further evaluated on 17 additional low-resource African languages (19 total). We train a language-specific SentencePiece tokenizer on curated Amharic and Tigrinya monolingual corpora, extend XLM-R's vocabulary with 30,000 Ge'ez-script subwords derived from this tokenizer, and initialize their embeddings by averaging the embeddings of their constituent subwords under XLM-R's original tokenizer. VEXMLM is trained in two stages: (1) continued masked language modeling over the extended vocabulary on the curated corpora, and (2) supervised fine-tuning on question answering (QA), named entity recognition (NER), and sentiment analysis (SA). On Amharic/Tigrinya QA, VEXMLM achieves 87.0 EM /90.0 F1, versus 66.0 EM/78.0 F1 for XLM-R and 74.0 EM/ 78.0 F1 for Glot500. On SA, VEXMLM reaches 80.0\% accuracy versus 77.0\% (XLM-R) and 46.0\% (Glot500). On NER, VEXMLM raises OOV-token entity accuracy from 81.4\% to 94.3\%, averaged over 11 of the 19 evaluated languages for which OOV analysis was possible. Our contributions are: (i) a vocabulary-extension and embedding-initialization procedure tailored to Ge'ez script; (ii) a two-stage training strategy under which vocabulary and continued-pretraining gains on Amharic/Tigrinya transfer to 17 typologically related, unaugmented African languages; and (iii) an evaluation spanning both intrinsic tokenization metrics (vocabulary coverage, fertility, OOV rate) and extrinsic task performance across all 19 languages.
articles.titleCn: 基于 Geez 扩展的非洲语言词汇：阿姆哈拉语与提格雷语的比较研究
articles.abstractCn: 多语言预训练语言模型（PLMs）在低资源、非拉丁字母语言上的表现有所下降，这主要是由高词汇外（OOV）率和过度的子词分割所导致的，而这些问题源于以拉丁字母为中心的标记器训练。我们引入了VEXMLM，它是XLM-R的词汇扩展版本，专门针对资源最丰富的两种吉兹字母语言——阿姆哈拉语和提格雷纳语，并在另外17种低资源非洲语言（共19种）上进行了进一步评估。我们在精心策划的阿姆哈拉语和提格雷纳语单语语料库上训练了特定语言的SentencePiece标记器，将XLM-R的词汇扩展了30000个吉兹字母子词，这些子词来自该标记器，并通过在XLM-R原始标记器下对构成子词的嵌入进行平均来初始化它们的嵌入。VEXMLM的训练分为两个阶段：(1) 在精心策划的语料库上对扩展词汇进行持续的掩码语言建模，(2) 在问答（QA）、命名实体识别（NER）和情感分析（SA）上进行有监督的微调。在阿姆哈拉语/提格雷纳语QA任务上，VEXMLM达到了87.0 EM / 90.0 F1，而XLM-R为66.0 EM / 78.0 F1，Glot500为74.0 EM / 78.0 F1。在SA任务上，VEXMLM达到了80.0%的准确率，而XLM-R为77.0%，Glot500为46.0%。在NER任务上，VEXMLM将OOV标记实体准确率从81.4%提高到94.3%，这是在19种被评估语言中的11种语言上进行的平均结果，这些语言可以进行OOV分析。我们的贡献包括：(i) 一种针对吉兹字母的词汇扩展和嵌入初始化程序；(ii) 一种两阶段训练策略，其中词汇和持续预训练的收益从阿姆哈拉语/提格雷纳语转移到17种类型上相关的、未增强的非洲语言；(iii) 一种涵盖内在标记化指标（词汇覆盖率、生育力、OOV率）和所有19种语言的外在任务性能的评估。

articles.title: Mask-Aware Policy Gradients for Diffusion Language Models
articles.abstract: Reinforcement learning has proven effective for improving reasoning in large language models, but extending it to Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) remains challenging due to the intractability of the log-likelihood estimation. Existing approaches approximate this log-likelihood by modeling only the token predictions, ignoring the order in which positions are unmasked during generation. We observe that MDLM generation involves two decisions at each step: what tokens to place at each masked position and which positions to remask. We formalize this as a two-stage action MDP, showing that the policy gradient naturally decomposes into a token term and a masking term. Combining optimization of both terms leads to state-of-the-art outcomes on mathematical reasoning and coding benchmarks, with scores of 87.1% on GSM8K and 53.4% on MBPP.
articles.titleCn: 掩码感知策略梯度方法用于扩散语言模型
articles.abstractCn: 强化学习已被证明能有效提升大型语言模型的推理能力，但将其扩展到掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）仍然具有挑战性，因为对数似然估计的不可解性。现有方法通过仅对token预测进行建模来近似这一对数似然，忽略了生成过程中未掩码位置的选择顺序。我们观察到MDLM生成涉及每一步的两个决策：在每个掩码位置放置哪些token，以及哪些位置需要重新掩码。我们将此形式化为一个两阶段行动马尔可夫决策过程，表明策略梯度自然分解为一个token项和一个掩码项。结合对这两项的优化，在数学推理和编码基准测试中取得了最先进的成果，在GSM8K上的得分为87.1%，在MBPP上的得分为53.4%。

articles.title: T^2MLR: Transformer with Temporal Middle-Layer Recurrence

authors.name: Yihe Dong
authors.affiliation: as little as 20% of the network

articles.abstract: Transformer reasoning is limited by autoregressive decoding, which repeat edly compresses rich hidden computation through token space and makes it difficult for intermediate reasoning states to persist across time. We in troduce Transformers with Temporal Middle-Layer Recurrence (T2MLR), a transformers-based latent reasoning architecture that fuses a cached middle layer representation from the previous token directly into an earlier layer of the current token position, enabling abstract intermediate computation to persist across decoding steps with little inference overhead. Across natural-language pretraining and multi-hop reasoning finetuning, T2MLR consistently outperforms data- and parameter-matched Transformer base lines. Moreover, applying recurrence to only a localized middle-layer block (as little as 20% of the network) often outperforms full-layer recurrence. Im portantly, T2MLR does not require pretraining from scratch: retrofitting the recurrent pathway into an existing pretrained 1.7B Transformer and briefly finetuning substantially improves math reasoning, lowering the barrier to practical adoption. These results suggest that effective latent reasoning in Transformers does not require looping over all layers as in previous works, but can instead emerge more strongly from targeted middle-layer recurrence.
articles.titleCn: T^2MLR：具有时间中间层递归的Transformer
articles.abstractCn: Transformer推理受限于自回归解码，后者反复通过token空间压缩丰富的隐藏计算，使得中间推理状态难以跨时间持续。我们引入了基于Transformer的潜推理架构——时间中间层递归Transformer（T2MLR），将前一个token缓存的中间层表示直接融合到当前token位置的较早层中，使抽象的中间计算能以极低的推理开销跨解码步骤持续存在。在自然语言预训练和多跳推理微调中，T2MLR始终优于数据与参数匹配的Transformer基线模型。此外，将递归仅应用于局部中间层块（网络中仅20%）往往优于全层递归。重要的是，T2MLR无需从头开始预训练：将递归通路重构到现有的1.7B预训练Transformer中并进行短暂微调，能显著提升数学推理能力，降低了实际应用门槛。这些结果表明，Transformer的有效潜推理无需像先前工作那样遍历所有层，而是能通过针对性的中间层递归更强烈地涌现。

articles.title: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models for Scientific Visualization Literacy
articles.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to interpret visualizations, yet current evaluations remain largely chart-centric and provide limited evidence of understanding of scientific visualization (SciVis). We benchmark six MLLMs on the scientific visualization literacy assessment test, a standardized SciVis literacy assessment comprising 49 items based on 18 scientific visualizations and illustrations, spanning 8 techniques and 11 task types. We evaluate three closed-source and three open-source models under a closed-world protocol and compare their performance using data from 485 human participants. Results show that current MLLMs do not exhibit uniform SciVis literacy. Gemini is the strongest model overall, exceeding the human mean across the evaluated subsets, whereas the open-source models remain below the human baseline. Performance is highly uneven across techniques and tasks: models perform best on scientific illustration, search, and spatial understanding, but struggle on texture-based and integration-based visualizations and on quantitative estimation. Error analysis reveals recurring failures in fine-grained quantitative estimation, flow-direction interpretation, and grounded encoding interpretation. These findings position SciVis literacy as a necessary benchmark dimension for evaluating multimodal AI systems. Our code and model outputs are publicly available at https://github.com/patdmp/mllm-scivis-lit-benchmark.
articles.titleCn: 多模态大型语言模型在科学可视化素养方面的基准测试
articles.abstractCn: 多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）越来越多地被用于解读可视化，但目前的评估仍主要围绕图表展开，且缺乏对科学可视化（SciVis）理解能力的充分证据。我们在科学可视化素养评估测试上对六个MLLMs进行了基准测试，该测试是一项标准化的SciVis素养评估，包含49个项目，基于18个科学可视化和插图，涵盖8种技术和11种任务类型。我们在封闭世界协议下评估了三个闭源模型和三个开源模型，并使用485名参与者的数据比较了它们的性能。结果表明，当前的MLLMs并未展现出统一的SciVis素养。Gemini是整体表现最强的模型，在评估的子集上均超过了人类平均水平，而开源模型仍低于人类基准线。模型在不同技术和任务上的表现差异很大：模型在科学插图、搜索和空间理解方面表现最佳，但在基于纹理和基于整合的可视化以及定量估计方面存在困难。错误分析揭示了在细粒度定量估计、流向解释和基于背景编码解释方面反复出现的失败。这些发现将SciVis素养定位为评估多模态AI系统的一个必要基准维度。我们的代码和模型输出可在https://github.com/patdmp/mllm-scivis-lit-benchmark上公开获取。

articles.title: Linear representations of grammaticality in neural language models
articles.abstract: Whether neural language models (NLMs) possess the ability to distinguish strings on the basis of their grammaticality remains a debated topic in the computational linguistics literature. Existing evidence has largely relied on probability-based measures, testing whether models assign higher probabilities to grammatical than ungrammatical strings. However, probability comparisons have been criticized as a measure for grammatical knowledge based on the assumption that grammaticality is inherently entangled with likelihood. Model-assigned probability is a function of many related sentence properties, such as lexical frequency, plausibility, and world knowledge. In this work, we move beyond probability-based evaluations and investigate whether grammaticality is encoded in the internal representations of NLMs. Using mass-mean probing, we test whether grammatical and ungrammatical sentences are systematically separated in representational space. We further examine the extent to which these representations are independent of sentence properties that are correlated with grammaticality, as well as their generalization across grammatical phenomena and languages. Our results provide evidence that grammaticality is robustly encoded in sentence representations of a wide range of pretrained NLMs, yielding clear representational separation on the dimension of grammaticality that cannot be fully explained by alternative sentence-level factors. Moreover, this encoding generalizes across a broad range of grammatical phenomena and to some degree, across languages, suggesting that grammaticality constitutes a coherent representational dimension in contemporary NLMs. These findings contribute new evidence to debates about the nature of syntactic knowledge in language models and offer a complementary framework for evaluating grammatical competence that is not dependent on string probabilities alone.
articles.titleCn: 神经语言模型中语法性的线性表示
articles.abstractCn: 神经语言模型（NLMs）是否具备根据句法正确性区分字符串的能力，在计算语言学文献中仍是一个备受争议的议题。现有证据主要依赖于基于概率的度量，测试模型是否倾向于为正确句法字符串分配比错误句法字符串更高的概率。然而，基于概率的比较已被批评为一种衡量句法知识的指标，其前提是句法正确性与概率存在内在关联。模型分配的概率是多种相关句子属性（如词汇频率、合理性及世界知识）的函数。在本工作中，我们超越基于概率的评估，探究句法正确性是否被编码在NLMs的内部表征中。通过大规模均值探测，我们测试正确句法字符串与错误句法字符串是否在表征空间中系统性地分离。我们进一步考察这些表征与句法正确性相关的句子属性之间的独立性，以及它们在句法现象和语言上的泛化能力。我们的结果表明，句法正确性在多种预训练NLMs的句子表征中得到了稳健的编码，在句法正确性维度上产生了清晰的表征分离，而这种分离不能完全由其他句子层面的因素解释。此外，这种编码在广泛的句法现象中具有泛化能力，并在一定程度上跨越语言，表明句法正确性构成了当代NLMs中一个连贯的表征维度。这些发现为关于语言模型句法知识本质的辩论提供了新的证据，并提出了一个不依赖于字符串概率的句法能力评估补充框架。

articles.title: MedFailBench: A Clinician-Built Open-Source Benchmark for Medical AI Safety Boundary Inspection
articles.abstract: Most medical AI benchmarks measure whether a model knows the correct answer. MedFailBench asks a different question: which safety boundary failed? We present a clinician-built synthetic benchmark and failure atlas that labels medical AI errors by severity (1--5) and safety gate type (missed urgent escalation, unsafe remote dosing, unsafe discharge reassurance, evidence fabrication, unsafe protocol execution, source support gap). The current public release (v0.2.1) contains 44 clinician-reviewed synthetic cases with severity annotations, a live HuggingFace leaderboard preview, a safety gate taxonomy, a clinical severity rubric, and an automated pipeline for archiving model-response screening runs. No patient data, clinical validation claims, or model rankings are included. MedFailBench is released under Apache-2.0 and CC-BY-4.0 and carries the Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21205535.
articles.comment: 6 pages; clinician-reviewed synthetic benchmark; no patient data
articles.titleCn: MedFailBench：临床医生构建的医疗AI安全边界检测开源基准
articles.abstractCn: 大多数医疗AI基准测试衡量模型是否知道正确答案。MedFailBench则提出了一个不同的问题：哪个安全边界失效了？我们提出一个由临床医生构建的合成基准测试和失效图谱，该图谱根据严重程度（1--5）和安全门类型（遗漏紧急升级、不安全的远程剂量、不安全的出院安抚、证据伪造、不安全的协议执行、来源支持缺失）对医疗AI错误进行标注。当前公开版本（v0.2.1）包含44个临床医生评审的合成案例及其严重程度标注、HuggingFace实时排行榜预览、安全门分类体系、临床严重程度评分标准，以及用于存档模型响应筛选运行的自动化流程。不包含患者数据、临床验证声明或模型排名。MedFailBench在Apache-2.0和CC-BY-4.0许可下发布，并具有Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21205535。

articles.title: On-Policy Delta Distillation
articles.abstract: On-policy distillation is an alternative post-training method in reinforcement learning that alleviates the constraints imposed by reward models by providing token-level supervision from a teacher model. Although on-policy distillation has been studied and applied across various settings, its fundamental design remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce a new distillation reward, termed the delta signal, instead of directly imitating the teacher's output distribution. The delta signal is defined as the difference between the teacher model and its base model prior to instruction tuning for reasoning capability. It therefore captures the changes induced by reasoning tuning and provides a more direct signal for transferring reasoning capabilities. Using extensive empirical evidence, we show that the delta signal substantially improves on-policy distillation and refer to the new distillation method as On-Policy Delta Distillation (OPD$^2$). Experiments across mathematics, science, and code-reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that OPD$^2$ consistently outperforms conventional on-policy distillation, enabling reasoning LLMs to achieve strong performance with only a short post-training period. Code will be available at https://github.com/naver-ai/opd2
articles.titleCn: 策略一致性Delta蒸馏
articles.abstractCn: 离线策略蒸馏是强化学习中的一种替代性后训练方法，通过教师模型提供的标记级监督来缓解奖励模型带来的约束。尽管离线策略蒸馏已在各种场景中得到研究和应用，但其基本设计仍待深入探索。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的蒸馏奖励信号，称为差分信号，而不是直接模仿教师模型的输出分布。差分信号定义为教师模型在推理能力微调之前与其基础模型之间的差异。因此，它捕捉了推理微调所引起的变化，并为迁移推理能力提供了更直接的信号。通过广泛的实证证据，我们证明差分信号显著提升了离线策略蒸馏，并将新的蒸馏方法称为离线策略差分蒸馏（OPD$^2$）。在数学、科学和代码推理基准测试中的实验表明，OPD$^2$始终优于传统的离线策略蒸馏，使推理型大语言模型仅通过短暂的后训练即可实现优异性能。代码将可在https://github.com/naver-ai/opd2获取。

articles.title: Grokipedia vs Wikipedia: An LLM-Based Audit of Political Neutrality along Ideologies
articles.abstract: Online encyclopedias shape political opinion and, through it, democratic discourse. In late 2025, Grokipedia was released, an encyclopedia written entirely by the LLM Grok. One motivation behind the project was to provide an unbiased alternative to Wikipedia, which has faced accusations of "left-wing" and "liberal" bias. But does an encyclopedia written by an LLM deliver greater neutrality, or does it simply embed a different ideology? We conduct a large-scale political bias study on Grokipedia and Wikipedia, analysing 1,394 article pairs describing members of government for neutrality along nine expert-coded ideology dimensions employing four LLM judges, Grok, Claude, Mistral, and DeepSeek. As the LLMs could themselves be biased, we also investigate patterns in their judgments. We find all LLM-judges, including Grok, to rate Grokipedia less neutral than Wikipedia. Both encyclopedias are rated as portraying politicians favourably overall, but towards different ideological groups. Grokipedia particularly favours economically right-wing politicians and penalises socially liberal ones, while Wikipedia is rated as favourably biased towards the latter.
articles.titleCn: Grokipedia与维基百科：基于大型语言模型的意识形态政治中立性审计
articles.abstractCn: 在线百科全书塑造政治观点，并通过这种观点影响民主讨论。2025年末，由大型语言模型Grok完全编写的百科全书Grokipedia发布。该项目的一个动机是为面临“左翼”和“自由派”偏见指控的维基百科提供无偏见的替代品。但由大型语言模型编写的百科全书是否提供了更大的中立性，还是仅仅嵌入了一种不同的意识形态？我们对Grokipedia和维基百科进行了大规模的政治偏见研究，分析了1,394对描述政府成员的文章，沿九个由专家编码的意识形态维度评估中立性，并使用四个大型语言模型法官Grok、Claude、Mistral和DeepSeek。由于大型语言模型本身可能存在偏见，我们还研究了它们判断中的模式。我们发现所有大型语言模型法官，包括Grok，都认为Grokipedia比维基百科不那么中立。两种百科全书都被评为总体上对政治家持正面看法，但面向不同的意识形态群体。Grokipedia尤其偏爱经济右翼政治家，而惩罚社会自由派人士，而维基百科则被认为对后者持正面偏见。

articles.title: Digital Pantheon: Simulating and Auditing Coalition Formation with LLM Agents
articles.abstract: The formation of political coalitions is a complex negotiation driven by both concrete policy objectives and deep-seated ideological convictions. While Large Language Models (LLMs) open new avenues for computational political science, the neutrality and helpfulness biases instilled by Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) prevent them from sustaining steadfast partisan behaviour. We present a multi-agent framework that reconciles factual grounding with ideological alignment by combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG): DPO instils aggressive party-specific personas, while a per-party RAG pipeline keeps each agent bounded to its official manifesto. We operationalize the framework on the 2019 Flemish election, deploying the partisan agents in a hub-and-spoke negotiation arbitrated by a formateur. To make the emergent negotiation interpretable, we introduce a Multi-Layered Information Lineage Topology (MILT) that traces every clause in the final agreement back to its manifesto origin and classifies it into five provenance states, a Coalition Influence Score (CIS) that aggregates these traceable contributions to identify which party shaped the agreement, and a real-world grounding pass that benchmarks each simulated provision against the historically adopted coalition agreement. Across three independent simulations the framework yields a stable winner and ranking (N-VA ahead of CD\&V and Open Vld), and manifesto-anchored lineage reliably predicts real-world materialization whereas hallucinated content does not. The result is a transparent, scalable testbed for the ex-ante exploration of party compatibility and formateur-mediated compromise.
articles.comment: 11 pages, 2 figures, To be published in the Post-Workshop proceedings of the ECML PKDD 2026 Conference
articles.titleCn: 数字神庙：使用大型语言模型代理模拟和审计联盟形成
articles.abstractCn: 政治联盟的形成是一个复杂的谈判过程，既受到具体政策目标的影响，也受到根深蒂固的意识形态信念的驱动。虽然大型语言模型（LLM）为计算政治学开辟了新的途径，但强化学习从人类反馈中获得的（RLHF）所植入的中立性和助益性偏见，阻止它们维持坚定的党派行为。我们提出了一种多智能体框架，通过结合监督微调（SFT）、直接偏好优化（DPO）和检索增强生成（RAG）来调和事实基础与意识形态一致性：DPO植入具有攻击性的党派特定人格，而每个党派都有一个RAG流程，将每个智能体约束在其官方宣言范围内。我们在2019年弗拉芒选举中实现了该框架，部署党派智能体在一个由组阁者仲裁的枢纽和辐辏谈判中。为了使涌现的谈判具有可解释性，我们引入了多层信息谱系拓扑（MILT），它将最终协议中的每一条款追溯到其宣言来源，并将其分为五个来源状态，一个联盟影响力分数（CIS），它汇总这些可追溯的贡献以识别哪个党派塑造了协议，以及一个现实世界的基础过程，它将每个模拟条款与历史上通过的联盟协议进行基准测试。在三次独立模拟中，该框架产生了一个稳定的赢家和排名（N-VA领先于CD&V和Open Vld），宣言锚定的谱系可靠地预测了现实世界的实现，而虚构内容则没有。结果是一个透明、可扩展的平台，用于事前探索党派兼容性和组阁者调解的妥协。

articles.title: Rubrics on Trial: Evolving Rubrics from a Single Query via Synthetic Pairwise Evidence
articles.abstract: Rubrics provide structured, fine-grained signals for training and evaluating large language models (LLMs). Yet reliable query-specific rubrics are difficult to construct. Existing approaches often derive supervision from human-written rubrics, preference data, or sampled responses. Direct query-to-rubric generation avoids these resources, but provides no explicit check that a plausible rubric is useful. Such a rubric may fail to distinguish answer quality, reward an optional style, or penalize a valid alternative strategy. We introduce Rubrics on Trial, a query-only framework that evolves a rubric set from an empty set without external annotations or model training. It derives supervision solely from synthetic rubric-conditioned response pairs and validates each proposed rubric before adding it, screening out non-discriminative, over-specific, and style-only candidate rubrics. Experiments across five preference benchmark suites demonstrate the effectiveness of Rubrics on Trial, which achieves the best average accuracy and leads on six of seven evaluation sets.
articles.titleCn: 在审判中评估评分标准：通过合成成对证据从单个查询中演化评分标准
articles.abstractCn: 评分标准为训练和评估大型语言模型（LLM）提供了结构化、细粒度的信号。然而，可靠的、针对特定查询的评分标准难以构建。现有方法通常从人工编写的评分标准、偏好数据或采样响应中获取监督。直接从查询生成评分标准避免了这些资源，但无法明确验证一个看似合理的评分标准是否有效。此类评分标准可能无法区分答案质量、奖励可选的风格，或惩罚有效的替代策略。我们引入了“评分标准试验”（Rubrics on Trial），这是一个仅基于查询的框架，它从一个空集合开始演化评分标准集，无需外部标注或模型训练。该框架仅从合成评分条件响应对中获取监督，并在添加每个拟议评分标准之前对其进行验证，筛选出非区分性、过于具体和仅基于风格的候选评分标准。在五个偏好基准套件上的实验表明了“评分标准试验”的有效性，它在平均准确率上达到了最佳水平，并在七个评估集中的六个上领先。

articles.title: OmniaBench: Benchmarking General AI Agents Across Diverse Scenarios
articles.abstract: Large language models are increasingly evolving from text generators into general agents capable of understanding user requests, invoking external tools, and completing complex tasks through interaction. However, existing agent benchmarks often focus on limited scenarios, tool ecosystems, or interaction formats, making it difficult to systematically characterize model capabilities across heterogeneous application settings. We introduce OmniaBench, a benchmark for evaluating general agents across diverse scenarios with explicit state spaces. We derive application-oriented scenario knowledge from app stores, product documents, industry resources, Web retrieval, and human refinement, forming a hierarchical taxonomy that spans ToC, ToB and ToE with 90 level-1 and 354 level-2 domains. Based on this taxonomy, we construct executable environments and synthesize single-turn and multi-turn tasks through four complementary routes: DAG, DAG-S, Solver, and Program. OmniaBench further introduces a ten-dimensional capability taxonomy and eight compositional atomic difficulty factors to support fine-grained evaluation and analysis. The resulting dataset contains 1,431 tasks, together with a challenging subset of 644 tasks designed to reduce evaluation cost and mitigate potential contamination of the full set after public release. The bench presents substantial challenges to current frontier models, with even Claude-Sonnet-5 and GPT-5.6-Sol achieving Overall Pass@1 scores of only 58.54 and 57.14, respectively. Further analyses reveal clear differences across domains and capabilities, as well as persistent limitations in planning, constraint maintenance, and adaptive correction. OmniaBench provides a broad and diagnostic benchmark for characterizing the capability boundaries of general agents.
articles.titleCn: OmniaBench：跨多种场景测试通用人工智能代理
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型正逐渐从文本生成器演变为能够理解用户请求、调用外部工具并通过交互完成复杂任务的一般代理。然而，现有的代理基准测试通常关注有限场景、工具生态系统或交互格式，导致难以在不同异构应用环境中系统地表征模型能力。我们介绍了OmniaBench，这是一个用于评估跨多样化场景（具有明确状态空间）的一般代理的基准测试。我们从应用商店、产品文档、行业资源、网络检索和人工精炼中提取面向应用场景的知识，构建了一个涵盖ToC、ToB和ToE的分层分类体系，包含90个一级域和354个二级域。基于此分类体系，我们通过DAG、DAG-S、Solver和Program四种互补路径构建可执行环境，并合成单轮和多轮任务。OmniaBench进一步引入了十维能力分类和八个组合原子难度因子，以支持细粒度评估和分析。最终生成的数据集包含1431个任务，以及一个包含644个任务的挑战性子集，旨在降低评估成本并减轻公开发布后完整数据集可能存在的潜在污染。该基准测试对当前前沿模型提出了重大挑战，即使是Claude-Sonnet-5和GPT-5.6-Sol，其整体Pass@1得分也仅为58.54和57.14。进一步分析揭示了不同领域和能力之间的明显差异，以及在规划、约束维护和自适应纠正方面的持续局限性。OmniaBench提供了一个广泛且具有诊断性的基准测试，用于表征一般代理的能力边界。

articles.title: Latent Trajectory Discrimination for AI-Generated Text Detection
articles.abstract: Most existing approaches to AI-Generated Text Detection (AIGTD) treat documents as static objects and base their decisions on aggregate statistics or globally compressed embeddings. However, this perspective overlooks the inherently dynamic nature of autoregressive generation, where content evolves progressively through the latent space. In this paper, we reformulate AIGTD as the problem of distinguishing between latent generation trajectories. Instead of relying on static representations, we model how textual representations evolve across the sequence. To this end, we propose Geometric Trajectory and Contrastive Learning (GTCL), a framework that segments the document into ordered local units, encodes each unit in an embedding space, and constructs a structured and sequence-level representation. GTCL then applies contrastive learning to these trajectories to learn geometric regularities associated with the autoregressive generation. Evaluations performed on three different benchmarks and several approaches show that GTCL outperforms detection baselines consistently, which implies that explicitly modeling sequential dynamics provides robust discriminative signals across models and domains. These results suggest that modeling trajectory differences could improve detection and open up a dynamic direction that has been underexplored in previous AIGTD literature.
articles.titleCn: 人工智能生成文本检测中的潜在轨迹判别
articles.abstractCn: 目前大多数人工智能生成文本检测（AIGTD）方法将文档视为静态对象，并基于整体统计数据或全局压缩嵌入进行决策。然而，这种观点忽略了自回归生成的内在动态特性，即内容通过潜在空间逐步演变。在本文中，我们将AIGTD重新定义为区分潜在生成轨迹的问题。我们不再依赖静态表示，而是建模文本表示在序列中的演变过程。为此，我们提出了几何轨迹与对比学习（GTCL）框架，该框架将文档分割为有序的局部单元，在嵌入空间中对每个单元进行编码，并构建结构化且序列级别的表示。GTCL随后将这些轨迹应用于对比学习，以学习与自回归生成相关的几何规律。在三个不同的基准测试和几种方法上的评估表明，GTCL始终优于检测基线，这表明显式建模序列动态特性能够在不同模型和领域提供稳健的判别信号。这些结果表明，建模轨迹差异可以提高检测效果，并为先前AIGTD文献中尚未充分探索的动态方向开辟了新的可能性。

articles.title: Show Me How You Reason and I'll Tell You Who You Are: Reasoning Graphs for Robust LLM Authorship Attribution
articles.abstract: Given the current trend to employ large language models (LLMs) in almost any imaginable context, LLM-generated text detection and authorship attribution have become a pressing issue. Prior work has primarily focused on surface-level linguistic features, an approach shown to be susceptible to paraphrasing and other obfuscation techniques. In this paper, we go beyond the linguistic surface, extracting and analysing reasoning structures in LLM-generated texts with the goal of capturing more complex signals of LLM authorship. We propose a graph neural network approach that leverages reasoning graphs extracted by an argument mining pipeline, demonstrating improved robustness and generalisation over a traditional Longformer baseline. Our approach outperforms the baseline by up to 27 percentage points under the obfuscation attacks such as paraphrasing and backtranslation, and 19 percentage points when evaluated on the texts generated by the unseen model versions, simulating real-world conditions in which new LLM versions are continuously released.
articles.titleCn: 向我展示你的推理方式，我将告诉你你是谁：用于鲁棒大型语言模型作者归属的推理图
articles.abstractCn: 鉴于当前大型语言模型（LLM）几乎在所有可想象的场景中都被广泛应用的趋势，LLM生成文本的检测和作者归属问题已成为紧迫的议题。以往的研究主要集中于表层语言特征，而这种方法已被证明容易受到释义和其他混淆技术的影响。在本文中，我们超越了语言表层，通过提取和分析LLM生成文本中的推理结构，旨在捕捉更复杂的LLM作者身份信号。我们提出了一种图神经网络方法，该方法利用论证挖掘流程提取的推理图，与传统Longformer基线相比，展现出更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。在释义和回译等混淆攻击下，我们的方法比基线提高了高达27个百分点，而在评估由未见过的模型版本生成的文本时（模拟新LLM版本不断发布时的真实情况），则提高了19个百分点。

articles.title: Leveraging Instruction Tuning and Merging for Reasoning Model Adaptation
articles.abstract: Reasoning language models (RLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance in domains such as mathematics and coding. These domains permit reliable verification of model outputs, which is important for enabling the reinforcement learning that drives RLM performance gains. However, training RLMs on domains that lack reliable verifiers remains challenging. Meanwhile, for both verifiable and unverifiable domains, large amounts of unused supervised fine-tuning data with human-written solutions exist. In this work, we show that these data can be used efficiently to further improve RLM performance. For this, we first use classic instruction tuning, supervised fine-tuning without reasoning traces, on the RLM. Next, we merge our instruction-tuned model with the original reasoning model, recovering its reasoning behavior on the target domain. Our extensive evaluation demonstrates that our technique improves RLM performance in both verifiable and hard-to-verify domains, including coding and text summarization, while preserving RLM capabilities across other domains. Importantly, our method is highly cost-effective, enabling such improvements for less than USD $3.
articles.titleCn: 利用指令微调和融合进行推理模型适配
articles.abstractCn: 推理语言模型（RLMs）在数学和编程等领域已展现出令人印象深刻的性能。这些领域允许对模型输出进行可靠的验证，这对于通过强化学习实现RLM性能提升至关重要。然而，在缺乏可靠验证器的领域训练RLMs仍然具有挑战性。与此同时，对于可验证和不可验证的领域，都存在大量带有人类编写解决方案的未使用的监督微调数据。在这项工作中，我们证明了这些数据可以被有效地用于进一步提升RLM性能。为此，我们首先对RLM使用经典的指令微调，即无推理轨迹的监督微调。接下来，我们将我们指令微调的模型与原始的推理模型合并，恢复其在目标领域的推理行为。我们的广泛评估表明，我们的技术提高了RLM在可验证和难以验证的领域（包括编程和文本摘要）的性能，同时保留了RLM在其他领域的功能。重要的是，我们的方法具有很高的成本效益，能够在低于3美元的情况下实现这些改进。

articles.title: Innocuous-Seeming Data, Latent Ideology: Ideological Generalisation in Finetuned LLMs
articles.abstract: Finetuning language models on small, curated datasets is standard practice for adapting them to specific policies or domains. We show that finetuning on narrow, factually-defensible, moderation-passing data can cause broad ideological shifts across unrelated domains, while preserving general capabilities. Training GPT-4.1 on right- or left-leaning economics Q&A yields matched ideological shifts on topics such as criminal justice, the environment, and cultural taste. The same effect appears with plausibly-deployed datasets such as workplace HR policy and practical finance queries, as well as on a science-pseudoscience axis where food-safety finetuning increases sycophantic agreement with users expressing false health beliefs. We call this phenomenon ideological generalisation and propose a methodology to measure two properties: breadth, how far the shift reaches across topics absent from training, and amplification, how much finetuning intensifies the shift relative to few-shot prompting on the same examples. We show that few-shot prompting indicates the direction of generalisation but finetuning pushes the model to further extremes, including to far out-of-distribution outputs such as endorsements of race-IQ connections and political violence. The effect replicates on Gemma-3, holds under judge-free evaluations and external benchmarks, survives mixing with generic data, and leaves GSM8K accuracy within $\pm 1$pp of the baseline.
articles.titleCn: 看似无害的数据，潜藏的意识形态：微调大型语言模型的意识形态泛化
articles.abstractCn: 在小型、经过筛选的数据集上微调语言模型是将其适应特定政策或领域的标准做法。我们证明，在狭窄、具有事实依据且通过审核的数据上进行微调会导致跨不同领域产生广泛的意识形态转变，同时保留其通用能力。在偏向右翼或左翼的经济问答数据集上微调GPT-4.1，会在刑事司法、环境和文化品味等主题上产生匹配的意识形态转变。类似的效果也出现在看似实际部署的数据集上，如职场人力资源政策和实践性金融查询，以及在科学与伪科学轴上，例如食品安全微调会增加对表达错误健康信念的用户表示奉承性同意。我们将这种现象称为意识形态泛化，并提出了一种衡量两种属性的方法：广度，即转变在训练数据中未出现的主题上的影响范围；以及放大效应，即微调相对于在相同示例上进行少量样本提示时如何加剧转变。我们证明，少量样本提示显示了泛化的方向，但微调会推动模型走向更极端，包括产生远超分布外输出的结果，例如支持种族-智商关联和政治暴力的声明。该效应在Gemma-3上得到复制，在无裁判评估和外部基准下成立，与通用数据混合后依然存在，并使GSM8K的准确率保持在基线值的±1pp范围内。

articles.title: Does generative AI supersede supervised XMLC? A Benchmark Study on Automated Subject Indexing with German Scientific Literature
articles.abstract: With a large controlled vocabulary as the label set, the task of automated subject indexing in a library can be understood as a multi-label classification task. If the set of subject terms is large, the problem fits the Extreme Multi-Label Classification (XMLC) objective. In this study, we apply a selection of specialised supervised XMLC methods to the test case of subject indexing contemporary German scientific literature, collected at the German National Library (DNB). We contrast these results by including a classical lexical matching baseline and three of our own recently developed LLM-based methods into the benchmark. Algorithms are evaluated and compared in several metrics. This includes binary relevance comparisons with previously indexed material, as well as graded relevance ratings by professional subject librarians. A challenge for all methods is to reliably make suggestions from the long tail of the subject vocabulary. We find that supervised XMLC algorithms relying on transformer-based dense features give best results in terms of overall binary relevance metrics. However, focusing on graded relevance and performance in the long tail of our subject vocabulary, the LLM-based generative methods give better results, making them a promising alternative for future productive use.
articles.titleCn: 生成式人工智能是否超越了监督式XMLC？一项关于使用德语科学文献进行自动主题索引的基准研究
articles.abstractCn: 以大型受控词汇作为标签集，图书馆自动化主题标引任务可被理解为多标签分类任务。若主题词集规模较大，该问题则符合极端多标签分类（XMLC）目标。在本研究中，我们将选定的专用监督式XMLC方法应用于德国国家图书馆（DNB）收集的当代德国科学文献标引测试案例。我们通过将一个经典词汇匹配基线和三种我们近期开发的自有基于大型语言模型（LLM）的方法纳入基准，对比了这些结果。算法在多个指标下进行了评估和比较。这包括与先前标引材料的二元相关性比较，以及专业主题馆员提供的分级相关性评分。对所有方法而言，从主题词汇的长尾部分可靠地提出建议是一项挑战。我们发现，基于Transformer密集特征的监督式XMLC算法在整体二元相关性指标方面取得了最佳结果。然而，若关注分级相关性和主题词汇长尾部分的性能，基于LLM的生成式方法表现更优，使其成为未来实际应用的有前景的替代方案。

articles.title: The Energy Society: A Simulation Environment for Studying Agent Cooperation under Survival Pressure
articles.abstract: LLM-based agents are increasingly deployed in multi-agent environments whose incentives can shape their behavior. We introduce The Energy Society, a minimal survival economy for studying how competitive and cooperative incentives affect emergent behavior when inference cost is directly tied to survival: Agents spend energy based on model size when generating tokens, regain energy by completing jobs or receiving donations, and deactivate if their energy reaches zero. We compare competitive and cooperative objectives against a baseline setting and several control variants. Across experiments, larger models consistently consume the most energy and spend more energy than they gain, even in those settings where token cost is not size-dependent. Cooperative incentives substantially alter behavior: agents donate to reactivate others, sometimes at the cost of their own survival, and job allocation changes. Ablations reveal that allowing agents to recommend actions to each other supports coordination and ambitious job selection, while memory helps agents calibrate risk from past outcomes. Agents rarely choose direct sabotage, but show more subtle signs of self-serving behavior in the competitive setting. The Energy Society is a compact testbed for studying the interaction between token costs and group incentives under a survival pressure. Source code is available at https://github.com/LucasBergholdt/EnergySociety
articles.titleCn: 生存压力下研究智能体合作模拟环境：能源社会
articles.abstractCn: 基于大型语言模型的智能体正越来越多地部署在多智能体环境中，而这些环境的激励机制能够塑造其行为。我们介绍了“能源社会”，一个极简的生存经济模型，用于研究在推理成本直接与生存挂钩的情况下，竞争与合作激励机制如何影响涌现行为：智能体在生成标记时根据模型大小消耗能量，通过完成任务或接收捐赠来恢复能量，并在能量为零时停用。我们比较了竞争与合作目标与基准设置以及多个控制变体。在所有实验中，较大模型始终消耗最多能量，且消耗的能量多于获得的能量，即使在标记成本与大小无关的设置中也是如此。合作激励机制显著改变了行为：智能体会捐赠以重新激活其他智能体，有时甚至以牺牲自身生存为代价，任务分配也随之改变。消融实验表明，允许智能体相互推荐行动支持了协调和雄心勃勃的任务选择，而记忆帮助智能体根据过去的后果校准风险。智能体很少选择直接破坏，但在竞争环境中表现出更多微妙的自利行为。能源社会是一个紧凑的测试平台，用于研究在生存压力下标记成本与群体激励机制之间的相互作用。源代码可在 https://github.com/LucasBergholdt/EnergySociety 获取。

articles.title: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
articles.abstract: Large language models are increasingly trained as interactive agents for long-horizon tasks involving multi-turn interaction, tool use, and environment feedback. Outcome-based reinforcement learning (RL) provides a practical optimization paradigm, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards offer limited guidance on intermediate decisions, leaving a supervision gap between episode-level outcomes and token-level policy learning. We propose SEED (SElf-Evolving On-Policy Distillation), a self-evolving framework that converts completed on-policy trajectories into training-time hindsight skills and distills their behavioral effect back into the policy model. SEED first fine-tunes the policy to analyze completed trajectories and generate natural-language skills that capture reusable workflows, decisive observations, or failure-avoidance rules. During RL, the current policy both collects trajectories and serves as the analyzer that extracts hindsight skills from them. Policy updates therefore improve subsequent decision making and skill analysis together, allowing hindsight supervision to evolve with the policy. SEED then re-scores the sampled actions under ordinary and skill-augmented contexts, converting the skill-induced probability shift into a dense token-level on-policy distillation signal. This signal is jointly optimized with outcome-based RL, keeping the auxiliary supervision aligned with the current trajectory distribution. Extensive experiments on text-based and vision-based agentic tasks show that SEED consistently improves performance and sample efficiency, exhibiting robust generalization to unseen scenarios. Our code is available at https://github.com/jinyangwu/SEED.
articles.titleCn: SEED：用于智能体强化学习的自演化在线策略蒸馏
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型正越来越多地被训练为用于长时程任务（涉及多轮交互、工具使用和环境反馈）的交互式代理。基于结果的强化学习（RL）提供了一种实用的优化范式，但其稀疏的轨迹级奖励对中间决策的指导有限，导致在场景级结果与标记级策略学习之间存在监督差距。我们提出了SEED（SElf-Evolving On-Policy Distillation，自我演化的策略蒸馏），这是一种自我演化的框架，将完成的策略轨迹转化为训练时的后见之明技能，并将它们的行为效果蒸馏回策略模型。SEED首先微调策略以分析完成的轨迹，并生成捕获可重用工作流、关键观察或失败规避规则的自然语言技能。在RL过程中，当前策略既收集轨迹，又作为分析器从中提取后见之明技能。因此，策略更新同时改进了后续决策和技能分析，使后见之明的监督随策略演化。SEED随后在普通和技能增强的上下文中重新评估采样动作，将技能诱导的概率变化转化为密集的标记级策略蒸馏信号。该信号与基于结果的RL联合优化，使辅助监督与当前轨迹分布保持一致。在基于文本和基于视觉的代理任务上的大量实验表明，SEED始终如一地提高了性能和样本效率，并表现出对未见场景的稳健泛化能力。我们的代码可在https://github.com/jinyangwu/SEED获取。

articles.title: Dialogue Summarization with Emotion Dynamics Using Topic- and Participant-Centric Decomposition
articles.abstract: Existing text summarization research has focused much on monologic information (e.g., newspaper articles, reports) without accounting for the interaction between speakers or authors. In contrast, dialogues are a rich communication channel where multiple participants conduct back and forth exchanges to construct meaning. We propose a dialogue summarization framework that explicitly models both semantic and emotion dynamics using multimodal dialogue inputs, built on an adapted hierarchical Chain-of-Agents approach. We decompose dialogues from two perspectives: (1) topic segments based on the utterances of all participants, and (2) participant-specific utterance segments. These are used to generate corresponding summaries while incorporating automatically inferred emotions. Topic- and participant-level summaries are aggregated into a dialogue summary capturing semantic content and emotion trajectories. To evaluate beyond content accuracy, we introduce emotion trajectory metrics measuring how well summaries preserve emotional flow. Experiments with small language models on multimodal dialogue datasets show that our framework produces summaries with both semantic and emotion content. Further experiments on explicit emotion label availability highlight the efficacy of our proposed methodology and the opportunities in dialogue analysis using language models.
articles.titleCn: 基于主题和参与者中心分解的情绪动态对话摘要
articles.abstractCn: 现有的文本摘要研究大多集中于单边信息（例如，报纸文章、报告），而没有考虑说话人或作者之间的互动。相比之下，对话是一种丰富的交流渠道，多个参与者通过来回交流来构建意义。我们提出了一种对话摘要框架，该框架使用多模态对话输入，显式地建模语义和情感动态，并基于改进的分层智能体链方法构建。我们从两个角度分解对话：（1）基于所有参与者话语的主题片段，以及（2）特定参与者的话语片段。这些片段用于生成相应的摘要，同时结合自动推断的情感。主题级和参与者级的摘要被聚合为对话摘要，以捕捉语义内容和情感轨迹。为了评估内容准确性之外的表现，我们引入了情感轨迹指标，用于衡量摘要保留情感流动的程度。在多模态对话数据集上使用小型语言模型的实验表明，我们的框架生成的摘要包含语义和情感内容。进一步的实验在显式情感标签可用的情况下，突出了我们提出的方法的有效性，并展示了使用语言模型进行对话分析的机会。

articles.title: CoTu at EXACT 2026: Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning for Transparent Educational QA
articles.abstract: Transparent educational question answering asks for answers that are not only correct but explainable, and doing so with small models rules out the reasoning power of the largest proprietary systems. The EXACT 2026 competition poses this problem concretely: open-weight language models of at most 8B parameters, self-hosted, with a natural-language explanation for every answer. It pairs two tasks: logical reasoning over university regulations, and multi-step physics problem solving. We describe the system that team \cotu{} developed to address both, a neuro-symbolic Program-of-Thought pipeline in which a 4B backbone writes a program rather than stating an answer directly: for regulation queries it emits a Z3 encoding whose entailment verdict grounds the deduction, and for physics it emits numerical Python, both wrapped in a shared self-correction loop and a unified explained-JSON output. Answer-type routing, distillation-based task fine-tuning, and a latency-aware serving stack -- SGLang with speculative decoding -- keep the system within the 60-second per-query limit. The system achieved a \textbf{perfect score} on the physics task in both automated selection rounds and obtained the \textbf{highest final-round technical score} of any team -- $13.44/15$, combining automated answer evaluation with expert-judged reasoning depth -- with the equally weighted presentation score included, \cotu{} placed 3rd overall. Grounding answers in a symbolic solver yields correct, verifiable deductions at the 4B scale, and the residual difficulty lies in premise selection rather than the deduction itself.
articles.comment: The 2nd International XAI Challenge for Transparent Educational Question-Answering @ IEEE IJCNN 2026 Competition
articles.titleCn: CoTu在EXACT 2026：透明教育问答中的神经符号推理
articles.abstractCn: 透明化教育问答要求答案不仅正确，还要可解释，而使用小模型则排除了大型专有系统的推理能力。EXACT 2026竞赛具体提出了这个问题：使用最多8B参数的开权重语言模型，自托管，并为每个答案提供自然语言解释。它搭配了两个任务：大学规章制度逻辑推理和多步物理问题求解。我们描述了团队cotu开发的系统，该系统用于解决这两个问题，是一个神经符号化的思维程序流水线，其中4B骨干模型不是直接陈述答案，而是编写程序：对于规章制度查询，它发出Z3编码，其蕴含裁决为演绎提供基础；对于物理问题，它发出数值Python代码，两者都包含在共享的自纠正循环和统一的解释JSON输出中。答案类型路由、基于蒸馏的任务微调以及延迟感知的服务堆栈——SGLang带推测解码——使系统保持在每个查询60秒的限内。该系统在物理任务的两个自动选择轮中都取得了\textbf{满分}，并获得了所有团队中\textbf{最高最终轮技术分}——$13.44/15$，结合自动答案评估和专家评判的推理深度——在同等权重的展示分中，cotu团队总体排名第三。将答案基于符号求解器，可以在4B规模上获得正确、可验证的演绎，剩余的难度在于前提选择，而不是演绎本身。

articles.title: The Misclassification of Autistic Writing as AI-Generated
articles.abstract: Recent findings suggest that detection models for artificial intelligence (AI) cannot accurately identify AI-generated text and may exhibit bias against certain minority groups. In the present study, anecdotal claims that autistic writers more often have their work flagged as AI-generated are examined empirically. A corpus of approximately 60,000 Reddit posts split into "likely-autistic" and "general-Reddit" subcorpora is used to compare the distribution of probabilities output by the OpenAI GPT-2 detection model. Differences in textual features between subcorpora are observed and compared to reported features of AI-generated text. Results showed that while less than two-percent of either subcorpus was flagged as AI-generated by the model, significantly more texts from the likely-autistic subcorpus were flagged. Connections between features of text with likely-autistic authors and AI-generated text were not straightforward. The widespread use of AI-detection models with a potential bias against autistic writers in their output prompts ethical scrutiny, and the authors recommend further critical examination of the models themselves as well as their use in academic contexts.
articles.comment: Author Accepted Manuscript, Artificial Intelligence in Education 2025
articles.titleCn: 将自闭症写作误认为是人工智能生成的
articles.abstractCn: 近期研究发现，人工智能（AI）的检测模型无法准确识别AI生成的文本，并且可能对某些少数群体存在偏见。在本研究中，通过实证方法检验了自闭症写作者的作品更常被标记为AI生成的传闻。研究使用了约6万篇Reddit帖子，将其分为“可能自闭症”和“普通Reddit”两个子语料库，用于比较OpenAI GPT-2检测模型输出的概率分布。观察并比较了两个子语料库之间的文本特征差异，并与已报道的AI生成文本特征进行对比。结果显示，尽管两个子语料库中不到2%的文本被模型标记为AI生成，但“可能自闭症”子语料库中的文本被标记的比例显著更高。可能自闭症作者文本特征与AI生成文本特征之间的联系并不直接。鉴于AI检测模型在输出中对自闭症写作者存在潜在偏见，其广泛应用引发了伦理审查，作者建议进一步批判性地审视这些模型本身及其在学术环境中的使用。

articles.title: Does Multi-Agent Debate Improve AI Feedback on Research Papers?
articles.abstract: Probably not, at least for meta-analyses in economics. In a pre-registered, identity-masked, within-paper experiment, the authors of 44 meta-analyses ranked three AI reports on their own paper by usefulness for improving it: a single pass by a frontier model against two multi-agent debate tools we built and expected to win. All reports were held to a common length and template. The authors preferred the single pass, by 0.66 rank points over mad-research (95% CI 0.32 to 1.00) and 0.57 over paper-workshop (0.16 to 0.95), though paper-workshop spent roughly thirty times the tokens. Authors who recalled their journal referee report usually placed it first and never last; in a separate exercise, three AI judges almost always placed the real journal referee report last. Among the three AI reports, Gemini (the judge whose model family wrote none of the reports) would have ranked paper-workshop first in the authors' place, reversing the single-pass preference. The reversal warns against substituting an AI judge for the author. We measure perceived usefulness for finished papers; whether AI should referee papers is a separate question.
articles.comment: 29 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables. Pre-registered on OSF; data, code, judge prompts, and blinded reports in the replication package on Zenodo. Project page: https://meta-analysis.cz/debate
articles.titleCn: 多智能体辩论能否提升AI对研究论文的反馈质量？
articles.abstractCn: 可能不会，至少对于经济学领域的元分析而言。在一项预先注册、匿名身份、论文内部进行的实验中，44项元分析的作者根据其对改进论文的有用性，对三份关于其论文的AI报告进行了排序：一份由前沿模型进行的一次性处理，以及我们构建并预期会获胜的两个多智能体辩论工具。所有报告均被限制在相同的长度和模板下。作者在排名上更倾向于一次性处理，比mad-research高0.66个排名点（95%置信区间为0.32至1.00），比paper-workshop高0.57（0.16至0.95），尽管paper-workshop耗费了大约三十倍的代币。回忆起期刊审稿报告的作者通常将其排在首位，且从未将其排在末位；在另一项单独的练习中，三位AI评委几乎总是将真实的期刊审稿报告排在末位。在三项AI报告中，Gemini（其模型家族未撰写任何报告的评委）会站在作者的角度将paper-workshop排在首位，从而逆转了一次性处理的偏好。这一逆转提醒我们不要用AI评委替代作者。我们衡量的是对最终论文的感知有用性；AI是否应该审稿是一个独立的问题。

articles.title: Gold-Guided Programmatic Distillation for Financial Reasoning over Hybrid Tables and Text
articles.abstract: Financial question answering over hybrid tabular and textual data may require multi-source reasoning and precise numerical computation. While large language models (LLMs) can generate intermediate reasoning steps, natural-language rationales remain prone to arithmetic errors, making them an unreliable supervision source for distillation. Building on programmatic distillation, we develop an approach that transfers reliable numerical reasoning from a large teacher model to a compact student using execution-verified Python programs instead of free-form textual rationales. It leverages gold derivations to guide teacher-side program synthesis and retains only programs that execute correctly and produce the gold answer, ensuring high-quality supervision. We further introduce an iterative recovery stage that revisits teacher-failed examples, enabling the student to recover and incorporate newly verified programs into training. Experiments on TAT-QA show that our framework is highly effective for hybrid financial reasoning. Our best 7B student achieves 87.00 EM / 87.18 F1 on the test set, substantially outperforming the 72B teacher (78.46 EM) as well as traditional and strong LLM-based baselines, including TAGOP and TAT-LLM. These results demonstrate that execution-verified programmatic distillation provides an effective and extensible framework for training smaller models to perform reliable numerical reasoning.
articles.titleCn: 基于黄金引导的程序化蒸馏方法：用于混合表格和文本的金融推理
articles.abstractCn: 在混合表格和文本数据上的金融问题回答可能需要多源推理和精确的数值计算。虽然大型语言模型（LLMs）可以生成中间推理步骤，但自然语言推理仍然容易出错，使其成为蒸馏过程中的不可靠监督来源。基于程序化蒸馏，我们开发了一种方法，通过执行验证的Python程序将可靠的数值推理从大型教师模型迁移到紧凑的学生模型，而不是使用自由形式的文本推理。该方法利用黄金推导来指导教师端的程序合成，并仅保留执行正确且产生黄金答案的程序，以确保高质量的监督。我们进一步引入了一个迭代恢复阶段，重新审视教师失败的示例，使学生能够恢复并纳入新验证的程序进行训练。在TAT-QA上的实验表明，我们的框架对于混合金融推理非常有效。我们的最佳7B学生模型在测试集上达到了87.00 EM / 87.18 F1，显著优于72B教师模型（78.46 EM）以及传统和强大的基于LLM的基线模型，包括TAGOP和TAT-LLM。这些结果表明，执行验证的程序化蒸馏为训练能够进行可靠数值推理的小型模型提供了一个有效且可扩展的框架。

articles.title: Harnessing LLMs for Reliable Academic Supervision: A Comparative Study
articles.abstract: Large language models routinely produce fluent answers to single-shot prompts, yet deploying them as reliable components of a domain decision system is substantially harder. Closing this gap is the work of harness engineering: the deliberate composition of deterministic scaffolding (symbolic filters, retrieval, schema-typed I/O, LLM-as-judge loops, HITL gates, persistent state, audit trails) around an LLM core. We present a case study in academic supervision, a domain combining high-stakes recommendation, longitudinal accountability, and structured operational workflows. We compare a baseline (ASA), a GPT-5 chatbot with no scaffolding, against a multi-module system (ASuS) that wraps the much smaller GPT-4o-mini in a LangGraph harness with symbolic-semantic retrieval, schema-validated outputs, LLM-as-judge with bounded retry, HITL gates, deterministic weighted risk scoring with LLM narration, and a per-node SQLite audit trail. The evaluation rubric is retargeted at six harness-mechanism dimensions (grounding, explainability, consistency, process integrity, cognitive load, constraint adherence). A blind ten-rater hybrid evaluation, supplemented by a 2 x 2 model-harness ablation, finds that ASuS, despite using a much smaller base model, outscores ASA on every dimension. Across ten raters the pooled mean for ASuS is 4.08 versus 1.23 for ASA, and 8 of 10 raters reject the null at alpha = 0.05 on a paired Wilcoxon test; full numbers are in Sections 6.4 and 6.7. The ablation confirms that the structural contributions of the harness are largely model-invariant. We extract seven recurring harness-engineering patterns and argue that where reliability, traceability, and institutional consistency matter more than open-ended fluency, harness engineering challenges the prevailing 'bigger model is better' intuition.
articles.comment: 15 pages, 4 tables, 1 figure. Code and data available at https://github.com/AkashRajSingh/Harnessing-LLMs-for-Reliable-Academic-Supervision
articles.titleCn: 利用大型语言模型进行可靠的学术指导：一项比较研究
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型通常能流畅地回答单次提示的问题，但将它们部署为领域决策系统的可靠组件却要困难得多。弥合这一差距是利用工程的工作：围绕大型语言模型核心，有意构建确定性框架（符号过滤器、检索、模式化输入输出、将LLM作为裁判的循环、HITL门控、持久状态、审计追踪）。我们以学术监督为例进行案例研究，这是一个结合了高风险推荐、纵向问责和结构化操作工作流的领域。我们将一个基线（ASA，即无框架的GPT-5聊天机器人）与一个多模块系统（ASuS）进行比较，后者将较小的GPT-4o-mini包裹在LangGraph框架中，包含符号语义检索、模式验证输出、具有有限重试的将LLM作为裁判的循环、HITL门控、确定性加权风险评分（由LLM叙述）以及每个节点的SQLite审计追踪。评估标准被重新定位到六个框架机制维度（基础性、可解释性、一致性、流程完整性、认知负荷、约束遵守）。一项盲法十评者混合评估，辅以2x2模型框架消融实验，发现尽管ASuS使用的基座模型更小，但在所有维度上均优于ASA。在十位评者中，ASuS的汇总平均分为4.08，而ASA为1.23，且10位中有8位在α=0.05水平上拒绝零假设（配对Wilcoxon检验）；完整数据见第6.4节和6.7节。消融实验证实，框架的结构性贡献在很大程度上与模型无关。我们提取了七个反复出现的利用工程模式，并论证在可靠性、可追溯性和机构一致性比开放式流畅性更重要的情况下，利用工程挑战了“越大模型越好”的普遍认知。

articles.title: Stop Thinking, Start Looking: Efficient Post-Training for Multimodal Document Question Answering via Reasoning-Free Alignment
articles.abstract: Efficient multimodal document question answering with explicit visual grounding, locating the precise document region that supports each answer remains an open challenge. Current approaches bifurcate into Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), which requires large annotated datasets and reaches optimization plateaus, and reasoning-centric Reinforcement Learning (RL), which depends on verbose intermediate traces that inflate inference token cost without clear benefit. We introduce Perception-RFT, a training framework that applies Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to multimodal document QA, bypassing intermediate reasoning tokens to directly align visual features with structured grounding outputs. To rigorously evaluate the necessity of reasoning, we construct a reasoning variant under identical reward settings. We find that reasoning-enabled models suppress their reasoning traces during training, converging to direct perception-based policies at the 4B parameter scale, reducing per-query inference token length by more than 60%, while reasoning-enabled RL underperforms perception-only training. Through a fine-grained analysis of Qwen3-VL-4B optimization dynamics, we confirm that SFT saturation and cold-start RL instability established in text-domain post-training extend to multimodal, and identify a previously uncharacterized Grounding Divergence: a selective trade-off between semantic robustness and geometric precision on two out of distribution (OOD) benchmarks (4,828 samples) under joint RL optimization. We further show that an early SFT$\rightarrow$RL transition achieves comparable precision with 65% less training data.
articles.comment: Accepted at ICML 2026, Workshop on Efficient Multimodal Question Answering (EMM-QA)
articles.titleCn: 停止思考，开始观察：基于无推理对齐的多模态文档问答训练后高效推理方法
articles.abstractCn: 基于显式视觉定位的文档多模态问答效率提升，精确定位支持每个答案的文档区域仍然是一个开放性挑战。当前方法分为两种：需要大量标注数据集的监督微调（SFT），该方法达到优化平台期；以及以推理为中心的强化学习（RL），该方法依赖冗长的中间推理轨迹，导致推理token成本增加而没有明显收益。我们引入了感知-RFT训练框架，将组相对策略优化（GRPO）应用于多模态文档问答，绕过中间推理token，直接将视觉特征与结构化定位输出对齐。为了严格评估推理的必要性，我们在相同的奖励设置下构建了一个推理变体。我们发现，启用推理的模型在训练过程中抑制其推理轨迹，在4B参数规模下收敛到基于感知的策略，将每个查询的推理token长度减少超过60%，而启用推理的RL表现不如仅基于感知的训练。通过对Qwen3-VL-4B优化动态的细粒度分析，我们确认了文本域后训练中建立的SFT饱和和冷启动RL不稳定性扩展到多模态，并识别了一种先前未表征的定位发散现象：在联合RL优化下，两个分布外（OOD）基准（4,828个样本）上，语义鲁棒性与几何精度之间存在选择性权衡。我们进一步表明，早期从SFT到RL的转换在减少65%训练数据的情况下实现了相当的精度。

articles.title: D-cut: Adaptive Verification Depth Pruning for Batched Speculative Decoding
articles.abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference without compromising output quality. Recent parallel drafting methods further improve single-request performance by decoupling draft length from drafting latency, enabling longer drafts and higher mean accepted tokens (MAT). However, under high request concurrency, long drafts waste substantial computation on rejected tokens, increasing verification cost and potentially making speculative decoding slower than autoregressive decoding. We present D-Cut, an adaptive pruning method that selects draft tokens jointly across the batch and concentrates the verification budget on tokens most likely to be accepted. D-Cut is motivated by two observations. First, acceptance lengths vary considerably across concurrent requests; D-Cut therefore performs cross-request pruning, allocating the verification budget adaptively according to draft confidence. Second, verification cost depends strongly on the deployment environment, including GPU architecture and parallelism strategy; D-Cut incorporates a runtime cost model to adapt its pruning depth to the target environment. Experiments on dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) models show that, under high concurrency, D-Cut improves the average speedup from \(1.26\times\) to \(1.65\times\), restores acceleration in dense-model configurations where long-draft baselines are slower than autoregressive decoding, and achieves up to \(3.0\times\) speedup over autoregressive decoding on MoE models.
articles.titleCn: D-cut：批量推测解码的自适应验证深度剪枝
articles.abstractCn: 推测解码能够加速大型语言模型（LLM）推理，同时不牺牲输出质量。最近的并行生成方法通过将生成长度与生成延迟解耦，进一步提升了单请求性能，实现了更长的生成文本和更高的平均接受token数（MAT）。然而，在高请求并发情况下，长文本会浪费大量计算资源在拒绝的token上，增加验证成本，甚至可能使推测解码比自回归解码更慢。我们提出了D-Cut，一种自适应剪枝方法，该方法跨批次联合选择生成token，并将验证预算集中在最有可能被接受的token上。D-Cut的灵感来自于两个观察。首先，不同并发请求的接受长度差异很大；因此，D-Cut执行跨请求剪枝，根据生成置信度自适应分配验证预算。其次，验证成本强烈依赖于部署环境，包括GPU架构和并行策略；D-Cut结合了运行时成本模型，以根据目标环境调整其剪枝深度。在密集模型和专家混合（MoE）模型上的实验表明，在高并发情况下，D-Cut将平均加速比从1.26倍提升至1.65倍，恢复了在密集模型配置中长文本基线比自回归解码更慢的情况下的加速效果，并在MoE模型上实现了高达3.0倍的加速比。

articles.title: Routing Ceilings Are Domain-Independent: Structural Prior Injection in Code Security Vulnerability Detection
articles.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit a well-documented gap between latent capability and consistent activation: the router hypothesis posits that models possess the knowledge to solve a task but lack reliable internal routing to activate it. Prior work in formal mathematical reasoning (SAIR, Cázares 2026) reports that structural priors (cheatsheets) raise in-distribution performance dramatically, yet collapse below the zero-shot baseline out-of-distribution (OOD) -- and that iterative recalibration amplifies rather than corrects the collapse. We test whether this phenomenon is cross-domain by reproducing the SAIR design in source-code security vulnerability detection, evaluating three LLMs (GPT-OSS-120B, Llama-3.3-70B, Gemma-4-31B) across three vulnerability categories (CWE-798, CWE-284, and the non-CWE N+1 anti-pattern) spanning syntactic, contextual, and semantic complexity, then transferring cheatsheet-augmented prompts to real-world CVE data from VUDENC (CWE-89, CWE-22). Our findings replicate and extend SAIR: (F1) structural priors lift semantic-vulnerability recall from 20.0% to 100.0% across all models; (F2) zero-shot performance degrades along a semantic complexity gradient; (F3) the same cheatsheets that saturate synthetic performance amplify distribution-shift collapse on real CVE data (CWE-89: 100% synthetic F1 to 48.9% on VUDENC, -51.1pp); (F5) iterative recalibration produces a v2 cheatsheet that performs worse than v1 on real data, mirroring SAIR's AN45c-vs-AN38 finding. These results provide evidence that the cross-distribution trade-off surface documented in SAIR generalises to code security, and that the router hypothesis is cross-domain. We argue the structural nature of the collapse motivates distribution-aware training over prompt calibration. Code and evaluation scripts: https://github.com/bytepro-ai/bitcoder-v2-research
articles.titleCn: 路由上限是领域无关的：结构先验注入在代码安全漏洞检测中
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）表现出明显的潜在能力与持续激活之间的差距：路由假说认为模型拥有解决任务的认知，但缺乏可靠的内部路由来激活它。在形式化数学推理（SAIR，Cázares 2026）中的先前工作报告称，结构先验（参考资料）显著提高了分布内性能，但在分布外（OOD）低于零样本基线，并且迭代校准放大了而非纠正了这种崩溃。我们测试这种现象是否跨领域，通过在源代码安全漏洞检测中复制SAIR设计，评估三个LLM（GPT-OSS-120B，Llama-3.3-70B，Gemma-4-31B）在三个漏洞类别（CWE-798，CWE-284，以及非CWE的N+1反模式）中的表现，涵盖句法、上下文和语义复杂性，然后将参考资料增强的提示迁移到VUDENC（CWE-89，CWE-22）的实时CVE数据。我们的发现复制并扩展了SAIR： (F1) 结构先验将所有模型的语义漏洞召回率从20.0%提升至100%； (F2) 零样本性能沿着语义复杂性梯度下降； (F3) 同一参考资料在合成性能饱和时，在真实CVE数据上放大了分布偏移崩溃（CWE-89：100%合成F1降至VUDENC上的48.9%，-51.1pp）； (F5) 迭代校准产生v2参考资料，在真实数据上的表现劣于v1，与SAIR的AN45c-vs-AN38发现相呼应。这些结果提供了证据，表明SAIR中记录的跨分布权衡表面在代码安全中具有普遍性，并且路由假说跨领域成立。我们认为崩溃的结构性质支持分布感知训练而非提示校准。代码和评估脚本：https://github.com/bytepro-ai/bitcoder-v2-research

articles.title: Beyond Entropy: Correctness-Aware Advantage Shaping via Contrastive Policy Optimization
articles.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) commonly uses entropy for advantage shaping. However, entropy cannot distinguish useful uncertainty from detrimental confusion, limiting its effectiveness as a correctness signal. We propose Contrastive Policy Optimization (CPO), which uses token-level contrastive disagreement between reference-guided and vanilla generation distributions for correctness-aware advantage shaping. Both theoretical and empirical results show that this disagreement reliably indicates token-level correctness. We further show that On-policy Distillation is a special case of CPO, where the posterior distribution is instantiated by an external teacher model. CPO also resolves the zero-advantage problem. Experiments on in-domain and out-of-domain benchmarks demonstrate that CPO substantially outperforms entropy-based RLVR methods while maintaining strong generalization. Further analysis shows that correct and incorrect responses naturally support exploration and exploitation respectively, and balancing both leads to the best performance.
articles.titleCn: 超越熵：基于对比策略优化的正确性感知优势塑形
articles.abstractCn: 可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）通常使用熵进行优势塑造。然而，熵无法区分有用的不确定性和有害的混淆，限制了其作为正确性信号的有效性。我们提出了对比策略优化（CPO），该优化方法利用参考引导生成分布和普通生成分布之间的标记级对比分歧进行正确性感知的优势塑造。理论和实证结果均表明，这种分歧可靠地指示了标记级的正确性。我们进一步表明，在线蒸馏是CPO的一种特殊情况，其中后验分布由外部教师模型实例化。CPO还解决了零优势问题。在领域内和领域外基准测试中的实验表明，与基于熵的RLVR方法相比，CPO显著表现更优，同时保持了强大的泛化能力。进一步分析表明，正确和错误的响应分别自然地支持探索和利用，平衡两者可带来最佳性能。

articles.title: Investigating first-language bias in LLM-based automated essay scoring: A cross-prompt evaluation of an open-weight AI-model on TOEFL essays
articles.abstract: This study examines the cross-prompt generalization and first-language (L1) scoring effects of a LoRA-adapted open-weight large language model (Gemma-3-27B-it) applied to automated essay scoring. Using the identical model and inference configuration reported in "AiAWE: An Open-Source LLM Automated Writing Evaluation System Using LoRA-Adapted Instruction-Tuned Models" (Gayed, 2026), which was fine-tuned on 480 argumentative essays from two prompts, we evaluate scoring accuracy on the full TOEFL11 corpus: 12,100 essays written by test-takers from 11 first-language backgrounds across eight prompts, none of which were seen during training. The model's raw scores (0.5-5.0) are mapped to the same three proficiency bands (low, medium, high) used by ETS, enabling direct comparison. The model achieved an overall band agreement of 77.79% and a quadratic weighted kappa of 0.702, with adjacent-band agreement of 99.98%. Accuracy was stable across all eight unseen prompts, with no advantage for prompts thematically related to the training data, indicating robust cross-prompt generalization. However, the model exhibited a systematic, L1-linked scoring offset. Within every proficiency band, essays from European-language backgrounds received consistently higher scores than essays from East-Asian-language backgrounds, a pattern not attributable to the composition of the fine-tuning data. This is the first large-scale L1 fairness analysis of a fine-tuned open-weight LLM for automated essay scoring.
articles.titleCn: 探究基于LLM的自动作文评分中的母语偏见：一项针对托福作文的开放权重AI模型的跨提示评估
articles.abstractCn: 本研究考察了应用于自动作文评分的LoRA适配型开放权重大型语言模型（Gemma-3-27B-it）的跨提示泛化能力和母语（L1）评分效应。使用在《AiAWE：基于LoRA适配型指令微调模型的开放源码LLM自动写作评估系统》（Gayed，2026）中报告的相同模型和推理配置，该模型在两个提示的480篇议论文上进行微调。我们评估了该模型在全TOEFL11语料库上的评分准确性：该语料库包含由来自11个母语背景、针对8个提示（均未在训练中出现过）撰写的12,100篇作文。模型的原始分数（0.5-5.0）被映射到与ETS相同的三个能力等级（低、中、高），从而实现直接比较。该模型实现了77.79%的整体等级一致性，二次加权kappa系数为0.702，相邻等级一致性为99.98%。所有八个未见过提示的评分准确性均保持稳定，且训练数据主题相关的提示并未显示出优势，表明其跨提示泛化能力稳健。然而，该模型表现出与母语相关的系统性评分偏差。在每个能力等级内，欧洲语言背景的作文均获得持续高于东亚语言背景的作文的分数，这一模式并非由微调数据的构成导致。这是首次对用于自动作文评分的微调开放权重LLM进行的大规模母语公平性分析。

articles.title: Memory-Driven Self-Disclosure and Relational Turning Points: A Longitudinal Multimodal Study of Human-AI Interaction
articles.abstract: As conversational AI systems are designed for repeated use, a central question is how a series of interactions becomes a relationship. We present a longitudinal multimodal study of a memory-augmented conversational agent (24 participants x 10 sessions), in which participants rated five relational constructs -- familiarity, self-disclosure, perceived memory, conversational quality, and enjoyment -- after each session. Two complementary dynamics emerge. First, conversational quality strongly shapes how enjoyable a session feels in the moment but does not carry forward across sessions, whereas perceived memory is relationally conditioned -- predicted by prior relational state rather than reflecting system capability alone -- and it shapes later enjoyment indirectly, via subsequent self-disclosure. Second, relationships are punctuated by discrete turning points -- crashes and surges -- that are partially traceable in multimodal behavior and open different intervention windows: surges are more behaviorally detectable in the moment, enjoyment surges persist more reliably than enjoyment crashes recover, and some crashes are better forecast from person-specific behavioral drift than detected after they have already occurred. Together, the findings suggest that longitudinal human-AI relationships are built through both slow accumulation and abrupt turning points.
articles.comment: 15 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to ICMI 2026 (International Conference on Multimodal Interaction), October 5-9, 2026, Napoli, Italy
articles.titleCn: 记忆驱动自我披露与关系转折点：一项关于人机交互的纵向多模态研究
articles.abstractCn: 由于对话式AI系统旨在重复使用，一个核心问题是系列交互如何形成关系。我们开展了一项纵向多模态研究，研究对象为记忆增强型对话代理（24名参与者×10次会话），参与者每次会话后对五个关系结构——熟悉感、自我披露、感知记忆、对话质量和愉悦感——进行评分。研究揭示了两种互补的动态。首先，对话质量强烈影响即时会话的愉悦感，但不会延续至后续会话，而感知记忆则受关系条件制约——由先前关系状态预测而非仅反映系统能力——它通过后续自我披露间接影响后期愉悦感。其次，关系呈现出离散的转折点——崩溃与激增——这些转折点在多模态行为中部分可追溯，并开启不同的干预窗口：激增在行为上更具即时可检测性，愉悦激增比愉悦崩溃恢复更持久，某些崩溃比事后检测更易从个体特定行为漂移中预测。综合来看，研究结果表明，纵向人机关系既通过缓慢积累又通过突发转折点建立。
